description: Analyze genealogy records to identify age inconsistencies. Calculate the implied birth year in column E using the record date and recorded age. In column F, flag discrepancies where the difference between the known birth year and the implied birth year exceeds two years as 'INVESTIGATE', otherwise mark them as 'OK'.

natural_language.prompt: You have genealogy research data with known birth years and census records. Calculate the implied birth year from each census record (Record Date - Recorded Age) in column E, then flag any records in column F where the implied birth year differs from the known birth year by more than 2 years.
